case_title: HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME VS SACRAMENTO, DELIA I.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $996.52 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO, DELIA I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO, DELIA I.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO, DELIA I. $996.52 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,071.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DELIA SACRAMENTO RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SACRAMENTO, DELIA I.
